title: Aalto University Teacher Views on Entrepreneurship 2012
description: Aalto University Teacher Views on Entrepreneurship 2012 charted the views of Aalto University teachers about entrepreneurship, entrepreneur spirit, and whether entrepreneurial people were suitable for the university, as well as attitudes towards the structural changes that were implemented in Aalto University, and how these changes have affected education and the teachers' work. The background information included the writer's age, occupation, and field of study. The dataset is only available in
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
